description: A developer needs to model the potential shadow flicker impact of a new wind farm on nearby homes.

nodes.task_description: Identify the locations of all nearby residences relative to the proposed turbine locations.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent maps all homes within a 2km radius.

nodes.task_description: Run a shadow flicker model using the turbine dimensions, sun path data, and topography.

expected_outcome.expected: Model calculates the expected hours of flicker per year at each residence.

nodes.task_description: Compare the results to local regulations or industry best practices (e.g., less than 30 hours per year).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds that two homes are predicted to experience more than 30 hours of flicker.

nodes.task_description: Propose mitigation, such as programming the turbines to shut down during periods when they would be causing flicker at the affected homes.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent recommends a specific operational control to solve the issue.
